scenes.title: Bedtime Story
scenes.background_prompt: A child's bedroom at night with a bed, a nightstand with a lamp on, glow-in-the-dark stars on the ceiling, a bookshelf, and a stuffed animal. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A child's bedroom at bedtime with soft warm light from a nightstand lamp. A mother in a comfortable gray sweater sits propped up against pillows on a single bed with a blue duvet. A boy of about six in dinosaur pajamas is snuggled against her side, eyes wide and attentive, clutching a stuffed bear. The mother holds open a large illustrated storybook between them, one finger pointing at a line of text on the page. The visible text reads: 'The rabbit runned as fast as he could.' The boy looks at the word with a slight frown, as if something sounds wrong. Glow-in-the-dark stars are stuck to the ceiling above. A small bookshelf holds a row of children's books. The room is cozy and dim except for the warm circle of lamplight.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place mother propped up against pillows on the bed, sitting and holding open a large illustrated storybook. Place boy snuggled against her side, eyes wide, clutching a stuffed bear.
